title: Meta's stock sinks on report company could raise tens of billions of dollars to fund AI push
summary: Meta shares dropped after the Financial Times reported that company could potentially raise tens of billions of dollars in a stock offering to help its AI push.

title: Nvidia, Meta and SLB rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says
summary: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down the degree to which S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared with their peers.

title: How Is SLB N.V.'s Stock Performance Compared to Other Energy Stocks
